app.title: beeromat
app.tagline: After the match. After the pint. Without the chaos.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.checkInbox: If your email is invited, a sign-in link is on its way.

magicLink.invalidTitle: This link can no longer be used
magicLink.invalidBody: The link has expired or has already been used. Ask your club admin for a new invitation.

setup.title: Set a PIN for this device
setup.subtitle: A short 4-digit PIN unlocks beeromat quickly on this device.

unlock.title: Enter your PIN
unlock.lockedBody: Five wrong attempts. Sign in again with the link from your email.
unlock.forgotPin: Forgot PIN — email me a sign-in link
unlock.forgotPinSent: Sign-in link sent. Check your email to set a new PIN.

invitation.welcomeBody: Set your display name to finish the invitation. We'll then email you a one-time sign-in link.
invitation.acceptedBody: We've sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device to finish setup.
invitation.errorInvalid: This invitation link is no longer valid. Ask your club admin to send a new one.
invitation.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

log.title: Log a beer
log.empty: No beers in the catalog yet — ask a stock manager to add one.

tab.title: My tab
tab.empty: No drinks yet — go to Log to add one.

settle.title: Settle up
settle.awaitingBody: You've marked {amount} as paid. The treasurer will confirm it shortly.
settle.notSetUpBody: Your club admin hasn't added bank details yet. Ask them to configure the club banking profile.
settle.scanHint: Scan with your banking app, then tap below once the transfer is done.
settle.markedPaid: Marked as paid — awaiting treasurer confirmation.
settle.claimPending: You already have a payment awaiting confirmation.
settle.recordFailed: Could not record the payment. Try again.
settle.paidOtherWay: I paid another way (cash, direct transfer)
settle.noteRequired: Add a short note (e.g. "cash to treasurer").

treasurer.noLongerPending: That payment is no longer pending.
treasurer.disputeBody: Reject {name}'s claim of {amount}. The member sees the reason.
treasurer.disputeReasonPlaceholder: e.g. no matching transfer on the bank statement
treasurer.disputed: Payment disputed — the member will be notified.
treasurer.undoBody: Reverse {name}'s confirmed payment of {amount}. They will owe it again.

bet.title: Settle a bet
bet.subtitle: Lost a bet? Take the winner's drink onto your tab.
bet.noSessionBody: Bets settle inside a session. A session starts when the first beer is logged tonight.
bet.logToStart: Log a beer to start the session
bet.noOtherDrinks: No other members have logged a drink this session.
bet.alreadyTransferred: That drink has already been transferred.
bet.outOfScope: That drink is from a closed session.
bet.selfTransfer: You can only transfer another member's drink.
bet.voidForbidden: Only the person who made the transfer (or a treasurer) can undo it.

history.title: My history
history.noSessions: No sessions yet — your drink history will appear here.
history.noDrinksInSession: No drinks logged in this session.

admin.bankingDesc: Bank details for payment QR codes
admin.beerTypesDesc: Manage the catalog and stock levels
admin.pendingDesc: Confirm or dispute member payment claims
admin.balancesDesc: What every member owes the club
admin.alreadyMember: That email is already a member.
admin.alreadyInvited: There is already an open invitation for that email.
admin.inviteFailed: Could not send invitation. Try again.
admin.bankingSubtitle: Bank details used to generate members' payment QR codes.
admin.ibanHint: Required for QR-code payments. Clearing it disables member self-pay.
admin.invalidIban: That IBAN is not valid. Check it and try again.
admin.bankingFailed: Could not save. Check the fields and try again.
admin.noBeerTypes: No beer types yet — add the first one.
admin.duplicateName: A beer type with that name already exists.
admin.beerTypeFieldsError: Check the fields and try again.
admin.restockArchived: Cannot restock an archived beer type.
admin.wouldGoNegative: That adjustment would take stock below zero.
admin.invalidDelta: Enter a non-zero whole number (use a minus sign to reduce).
admin.adjustReasonRequired: A reason is required for an adjustment.

dispute.banner: Your payment claim of {amount} was disputed
dispute.bannerWithReason: Your payment claim of {amount} was disputed: {reason}

errors.unauthorized: You need to sign in to do that.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for that.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
